tasks.description: Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of the current portfolio.

subtasks.description: Analyze strengths: Identify strong holdings with good momentum/fundamentals using calculate_ticker_performances and supporting data tools.
completion_evidence: Strengths identified from calculate_ticker_performances: High risk-adjusted leaders: APP (Sharpe 2.23, Sortino 3.66, alpha 1.146), PLTR (Sharpe 2.02, Sortino 3.63, alpha 0.904), SLVR (Sharpe 2.49, Sortino 4.10, low corr avg 0.231), NRG (Sharpe 1.77, Sortino 2.86, alpha 0.502), NVDA (Sharpe 1.59, Sortino 2.45), AVGO (Sharpe 1.56, Sortino 2.57), GREK (Sharpe 1.92), EIS (Sharpe 1.64), JPM (Sharpe 1.67), BSX (Sharpe 1.41). Portfolio-level: Sharpe 2.24, Sortino 4.45. Low baseline average pairwise correlation ~0.237 with diversifiers (VCSH/IGSB, commodities ETFs).

subtasks.description: Analyze weaknesses: Identify weak positions with poor profiles using calculate_ticker_performances and supporting data tools.
completion_evidence: Weak positions and risk drivers identified: REITs underperform and cluster: EQIX (Sharpe 0.184, alpha -0.122, 8.1% alloc), IIPR (Sharpe 0.032, ann_return -2.9%, maxDD -64.9%), FR (Sharpe 0.313), STAG (Sharpe 0.237), TRNO (Sharpe 0.131). High correlation within industrial REITs: FR|TRNO 0.866, FR|STAG 0.839, TRNO|STAG 0.796. Tail-risk outliers: DGNX maxDD -94.4%, catastrophic stress losses (e.g., -87.9% stagflation), OKLO large stress losses (e.g., -44% credit crunch). Semi cluster correlation high: ARM|NVDA 0.648, CRDO|NVDA 0.663, MTSI|NVDA 0.658; consider trimming secondary semis (MTSI 0.635 Sharpe) to reduce correlation. Bank overlap: JPM-FITB corr 0.773; consider pruning FITB. Utilities overlap: CMS-WEC corr 0.817, AEE-WEC 0.789; prioritize NRG/CEG and reduce AEE/one of CMS/WEC to reduce duplication. Portfolio beta 1.036 > target; average pairwise correlation 0.237 baseline (0.252 stress).

tasks.description: Perform deeper risk analysis and validation on the portfolio.

subtasks.description: Run calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix to identify highly correlated holdings.
Run calculate_portfolio_performance to assess metrics such as Sharpe, Sortino, Alpha, drawdown.
Run portfolio_stress_test to assess portfolio resilience in adverse scenarios.

tasks.description: Draw definitive, data-driven conclusions about portfolio strengths/weaknesses.

subtasks.description: Document which holdings to keep/adjust/remove based on analysis. No tool required.

tasks.description: Find new high-quality candidates to fill weaknesses or gaps in the portfolio.

subtasks.description: Use stock_screener to find replacements for weak holdings, focusing on low beta and high risk-adjusted return.
Repeat stock_screener at least two more times with varied qualifiers to ensure a strong candidate pool.

tasks.description: Build and record the new optimized portfolio based on findings.

subtasks.description: Define new portfolio allocations and thesis for each holding. No tool required.
Log the optimized portfolio to episodic memory using episodic_remember tool.

tasks.description: Run advanced analytics and iterative improvements on the new portfolio.

subtasks.description: Run heavy analytics (performance, beta, correlation, stress) using relevant tools to validate optimization.
Iteratively adjust allocations and re-test until target objectives are satisfied. No tool required.

tasks.description: Output the final optimized portfolio in strict JSON format with a detailed changes summary.

subtasks.description: Format and present portfolio output and change log per user-required JSON format. No tool required.

execution_history.reason: Weaknesses and risk drivers identified using ticker performance metrics, correlation matrix, and stress tests. Ready to propose removals/reductions and source replacements to lower beta/correlation and boost risk-adjusted return.

observations: Per-ticker performance identified weak/drag positions: EQIX Sharpe 0.184, alpha -0.122; FR Sharpe 0.313; STAG Sharpe 0.237; TRNO Sharpe 0.131; IIPR Sharpe 0.032, ann_return -0.029, maxDD -0.628; MTSI Sharpe 0.635; EMQQ Sharpe 1.004 (borderline).

High-correlation clusters raise pairwise risk: Industrial REITs very tight (FR|TRNO 0.866, TRNO|STAG 0.796, FR|STAG 0.839). Semiconductors highly correlated (ARM|NVDA 0.648, CRDO|NVDA 0.663, AVGO|NVDA 0.603, MTSI|NVDA 0.658).
Tail-risk outlier: DGNX extreme downside in stresses (energy shock -39.5%, Fed overtightening -34.6%, stagflation -87.9%) with maxDD -0.944 despite low baseline correlation (avg 0.012).

Portfolio risk posture: Beta 1.036 (above target), average pairwise correlation 0.237 baseline (0.252 stress). Concentration: Top 10 ~62-66% across scenarios; largest weights NVDA 6.5%, EQIX 8.1%, NRG 5.5%.
Strength anchors to keep/size correctly: APP Sharpe 2.227; PLTR 2.024; NRG 1.769; SLVR 2.486; EIS 1.645; GREK 1.923; NVDA 1.593; AVGO 1.564; BSX 1.410; JPM 1.669.
